name: fix-native-extension-compilation-failures
description: Fix http_parser.rb, bigdecimal, prism failing to compile with Ruby 3.2 on Windows
error: Failed to build gem native extension for http_parser.rb, bigdecimal, or prism
solution: Move em-websocket to dev group in Gemfile (only needed for jekyll serve --watch). It's not needed for builds and causes compilation issues.
when_to_use:
When you see native extension compilation failures during bundle install on Windows with Ruby 3.2,
especially for http_parser.rb, bigdecimal, or prism gems
command: # No command needed - edit Gemfile to move em-websocket to development group
